disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.body1: This is an experimental project. Using leveraged positions on DeFi protocols carries significant financial risk, including the complete loss of your deposited funds.
disclaimer.li1: You understand the risks of leveraged DeFi positions, including liquidation.
disclaimer.li2: You use this tool entirely at your own risk. The developers accept no liability for any losses.
disclaimer.li3: This software is provided as-is with no guarantees of correctness or availability.
disclaimer.li4: You are not accessing this from a jurisdiction where using decentralized finance tools or cryptocurrency is prohibited or restricted by law.
disclaimer.checkLabel: I understand and accept these terms

landing.headline: Leverage trading on Stellar. Simplified.
landing.subheadline: Open leveraged long positions on Blend Protocol pools with a single click. No perps, no funding rates — just recursive lending loops.
landing.step1Desc: Use Freighter, Lobstr, xBull, or any Stellar wallet to connect in seconds.
landing.step2Desc: Select a Blend pool and asset, then set your leverage multiplier with a slider.
landing.step3Desc: Turbolong executes the recursive lending loop atomically. Approve and submit.
landing.feat1Desc: Recursive supply/borrow in a single transaction. No partial execution risk.
landing.feat2Desc: Health factor, liquidation countdown, and borrow headroom updated live.
landing.feat3Desc: Claim and auto-convert BLND emissions to compound your position.
landing.feat4Desc: Set-and-forget leveraged USDC vault with permissionless rebalancing.
landing.feat5Desc: Trade across Etherfuse, Fixed, and YieldBlox pools on Blend Protocol.
landing.feat6Desc: Fast finality, low fees, and battle-tested Soroban smart contracts.
landing.riskDisclosure: Risk Disclosure: Leveraged positions can be liquidated if your Health Factor drops below 1.0. You may lose your entire deposit. This is experimental software — use at your own risk.

trade.leverageTip: Multiplier on your deposit. Higher leverage amplifies both yield and liquidation risk.
trade.leverageForDeposit: Leverage for the new deposit. This deposit is added on top of your existing position.
trade.adjustDisclaimer: Adjusts leverage by borrowing more (increase) or withdrawing & repaying (decrease).
trade.addFundsDisclaimer: Deposits additional funds into your existing position at the selected leverage.
trade.hfWarning: ⚠ HF too low — liquidation risk. Reduce leverage.
trade.poolFrozen: ⚠ This pool is Admin Frozen following the February 2026 oracle exploit. No new positions can be opened.
trade.nonBorrowableCollateralOnly: ⚠ {{sym}} is collateral-only on this pool — cannot be borrowed, so looping is not available.
trade.nonBorrowableBorrowOnly: ⚠ {{sym}} is borrow-only on this pool — cannot be used as collateral, so looping is not available.
trade.nonBorrowableGeneric: ⚠ {{sym}} cannot be looped on this pool.

position.title: Position
position.noPosition: No open position — use the panel on the left to open one.
position.assetHfTip: Health Factor for this asset only. HF = (collateral x c_factor) / (debt / l_factor). Below 1.0 = liquidatable.
position.poolHfTip: Health Factor across ALL your positions in this pool, weighted by oracle price.
position.borrowHeadroomTip: How much more USD you could borrow before Health Factor hits 1.0 (liquidation).
position.daysUntilLiqTip: Estimated days before HF drops to 1.0, based on the interest rate spread (borrow - supply).
position.claimConvertTip: Claim BLND and swap to position asset
position.resupplyTip: Deposit wallet balance as extra collateral
position.interestSpread: Interest spread: {{spread}}%/yr (borrow − supply). Claim & convert BLND to extend runway.

stats.title: Pool Statistics
stats.cfactorTip: Collateral factor — the fraction of your collateral that counts toward borrowing power. 95% means $100 of collateral lets you borrow up to $95.
stats.maxLeverageTip: Maximum leverage where Health Factor stays above the safe minimum. Derived from the collateral and liability factors.
stats.availableTip: Tokens currently available to borrow from the pool.
stats.utilizationTip: Pool utilization = total borrowed / total supplied.
stats.blndEmissionsTipSupply: BLND token rewards distributed by the pool. Shown as APR since emissions are linear and do not auto-compound.
stats.blndEmissionsTipBorrow: BLND token rewards that offset borrow cost. Shown as APR since emissions are linear and do not auto-compound.

overview.title: Portfolio Overview
overview.noPositions: No active positions across any protocol. Open a position to see it here.

toast.switchedTo: Switched to {{label}}. Please also switch your wallet to {{label}} before connecting.
toast.networkMismatch: Network mismatch: your wallet is on a different network. Please switch your wallet to {{expected}}.
toast.demoMode: Demo mode — connect a real wallet to transact
toast.poolFrozen: Pool is frozen — cannot open new positions
toast.poolFrozenAddFunds: Pool is frozen — cannot add funds
toast.hfTooLowTarget: HF too low at target leverage — reduce target
toast.targetSameAsCurrent: Target leverage is same as current
toast.firstBorrowExceeds: First borrow step ({{firstBorrow}}) exceeds pool available after deposit ({{available}} {{symbol}}). Reduce leverage.
toast.invalidHf: Health factor too low — reduce leverage.
toast.invalidUtil: Pool utilization limit reached — not enough liquidity for this borrow. Reduce leverage or deposit.
toast.invalidUtilClose: Pool utilization too high — not enough liquidity to close. Try again later.
toast.invalidUtilWithdraw: Pool utilization too high to withdraw all collateral. Debt was repaid — try withdrawing later when liquidity improves.
toast.invalidUtilAdjust: Pool utilization limit reached — not enough liquidity. Reduce target leverage.
toast.closingTwoSteps: Pool utilization high — closing in two steps…
toast.accountExists: Account already exists on testnet, skipping Friendbot
toast.openingUsdc: Opening USDC trustline and acquiring USDC...
toast.fundSuccess: Testnet wallet funded! USDC trustline opened and tokens acquired.
toast.usdcNoLiquidity: USDC trustline opened but no DEX liquidity to swap. You may need to acquire USDC manually.
toast.alertEmailVerify: Check your email to verify your alert subscription.
toast.alertInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
toast.liquidityWarning: ⚠ First borrow ({{firstBorrow}}) exceeds pool available after deposit ({{available}} {{symbol}}). Reduce leverage or deposit.
toast.approxNetApy: Approximate APY — Blend interest does not auto-compound. Actual net APR: {{apr}}%
toast.approxNetAprTooltip: Approximate APY: interest compounds but BLND emissions don't. Actual net APR: {{apr}}%

testnet.hint: Using Stellar Testnet — no real funds at risk
testnet.fundWalletTip: Fund with Friendbot XLM, open USDC trustline, swap XLM for USDC

misc.expertModeTip: Expert mode: lower minimum HF to 1.005
